info.title: absentify
info.description: absentify is a comprehensive absence management solution designed for Microsoft 365. This connector enables seamless integration, allowing you to automate workflows based on employee leave requests, track approval statuses, and synchronize absence data across your business systems.

x-ms-notification-content.description: Webhook payload when a leave request is created.

post.summary: When a leave request is created
post.description: Triggers when any employee in your organization submits a new leave or absence request. Use this to start approval workflows, send notifications, or update external calendars.

url.title: Webhook URL
url.description: The callback URL where absentify will send notifications.

payload_version.title: Payload Version
payload_version.description: Version of the webhook payload format.

x-ms-notification-content.description: Webhook payload when a leave request status changes.

post.summary: When a leave request status changes
post.description: Triggers when the status of a leave request changes (approved, declined, or canceled). Use this to notify employees, update HR systems, or sync calendar entries.

url.title: Webhook URL
url.description: The callback URL where absentify will send notifications.

payload_version.title: Payload Version
payload_version.description: Version of the webhook payload format.

get.description: Get all members with optional filters for departments, status, employment dates, admin status, approval process, approvers, allowance types, name, birthday month, and manager type. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: has_approvers
parameters.description: Filter by whether member has approvers.

post.description: Invite a new member to the workspace. Requires absentify Plus plan.

schema.description: The ID of the invited member.

get.description: Retrieve a specific member by their unique ID. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

put.description: Update an existing member's information. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

schema.description: The ID of the updated member.

delete.description: Delete a member. All data will be deleted permanently. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

schema.description: The ID of the deleted member.

get.description: Retrieve a member by their Microsoft user ID. Requires absentify Plus plan.
Retrieve a member by their email address. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address of the member.

get.description: Retrieve a member by their custom ID. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: custom_id
parameters.description: The custom ID of the member.

put.description: Update the approvers for a specific member. Supports Microsoft profile managers, department settings, or custom approvers. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

put.description: Update a member's allowance for a specific allowance type and year. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

parameters.name: allowance_type_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the allowance type.

404.description: Member or allowance type not found.

post.description: Add a new work schedule for a member. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

get.description: Retrieve all departments in the workspace. Requires absentify Plus plan.

post.description: Create a new department in the workspace. Requires absentify Plus plan.

schema.description: The ID of the created department.

put.description: Update an existing department. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the department.

schema.description: The ID of the updated department.

delete.description: Delete a department from the workspace. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the department.

schema.description: The ID of the deleted department.

get.description: Retrieve all leave types configured in the workspace. Requires absentify Plus plan.

post.description: Create a new leave type in the workspace. Requires absentify Plus plan.

schema.description: The ID of the created leave type.

put.description: Update an existing leave type. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the leave type.

schema.description: The ID of the updated leave type.

delete.description: Delete a leave type from the workspace. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the leave type.

schema.description: The ID of the deleted leave type.

get.description: Retrieve all leave requests with optional filters. Requires absentify Plus plan.

post.description: Create a new leave request for a member. Requires absentify Plus plan.

schema.description: The ID of the created request.

get.description: Retrieve a specific leave request by its unique ID. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the request.

put.description: Update the status of a leave request (approve, decline, or cancel). Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the request.

schema.description: The ID of the updated request.

delete.description: Delete a leave request permanently. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the request.

schema.description: The ID of the deleted request.

get.description: Retrieve all public holiday calendars configured in the workspace. Requires absentify Plus plan.

post.description: Create a new public holiday calendar in the workspace. Requires absentify Plus plan.

schema.description: The ID of the created public holiday calendar.

get.summary: [Plus] Get public holiday calendar by ID
get.description: Retrieve a specific public holiday calendar with all its holidays. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the public holiday calendar.

schema.description: The ID of the updated public holiday calendar.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the public holiday calendar.

schema.description: The ID of the deleted public holiday calendar.

get.description: Retrieve the workspace settings and configuration. Requires absentify Plus plan.
Retrieve absences for a specific date range. Returns approved leave requests within the specified period. Requires absentify Plus plan.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start date for the absence query (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End date for the absence query (YYYY-MM-DD).

event_type.description: The type of event that triggered this webhook.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the request was created.

updatedAt.title: Updated At
updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was last updated.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Reason provided for the leave request.
